function.name: get_code
function.description: Authenticate the caller (phone + PIN) and return the active access code for the requested unit. Returns ok=false with a message if auth fails, the caller is not authorized for that unit, or no active code exists. Always call this tool — never invent a code.

phone_e164.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +15555550111. Use the caller-ID-derived value if available; otherwise ask the caller and normalize.

user_pin.description: Caller's 4-digit PIN. Pass exactly as the caller spoke it, digits only.

unit_label.description: The unit's printed label, e.g. 'PR-204' or 'BLUE-7'. Pass exactly as the caller said it; the backend match is case-insensitive.

messages.content: One moment while I look that up.
